name: Tangy Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 1/2 oz Can Water Chestnuts, drained and sliced
5 slice Bacon, fried, drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and discard tough spinach stems. Rinse leaves and pat dry. Tear into bite-sized pieces.
2. Layer the sprouts, water chestnuts, and spinach into your salad bowl (in that order).
3. Add the crumbled bacon and chopped egg on top of the spinach leaves.
4. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Combine all dressing ingredients in a jar or bowl. Shake or blend well.
6. Just before serving, pour dressing over the salad and toss well.
7. Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and toss again.
Note: To toast sesame seeds, place them in a small, heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Toast until you hear the seeds begin to pop, shaking the pan to keep the seeds from scorching.
